failures.description: The agent selected the more expensive smartphone as the cheapest despite the tool result showing a lower-priced available smartphone.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price, with item 5339029584 priced at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 priced at $1157.86. The Executor then synthesized an answer claiming 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest, which directly contradicts the tool result. This is not an invalid invocation, unsupported intent, or underspecification; it is a reasoning error over the returned evidence.
